creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #0)
It's presence still checked in the code (./googleapiclient/_auth.py f.e.), but it's deprecated upstream [1], so should be safe to remove this dependency. 

[1] https://github.com/googleapis/google-api-python-client/blob/74d230fa4c9eb2c6a3219e90b57fc7a2b7605029/docs/oauth.md#oauth2client-deprecation
